payload.summary: US-076: add replayable story-to-backlog resolves/references relationships with one designated resolver and stable backlog UID identity.

payload.evidence: Implemented stable UID-backed resolves/references links, one-resolver enforcement, replayable semantic operations, resolver-proof invalidation, and queryable CLI relationships.
payload.verify_command: sh -c 'cargo test -p harness-cli -- --list | rg "story_backlog_relationship" && cargo test -p harness-cli story_backlog_relationship -- --nocapture && HARNESS_CLI=target/debug/harness-cli scripts/validate-changeset-rebuild.sh'

payload.actions_taken: ["read approved US-076 contract","implemented CLI relationship commands","added migration 010","added replay handling","ran focused and workspace validation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["use stable backlog UIDs in links and semantic operations","allow one accepted resolver and unlimited references","invalidate proof on resolver authority changes","keep closure out of US-076"]
payload.notes: Duration and token estimates are unavailable in this runtime. Validation passed: cargo test --workspace; cargo fmt --check; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; target-debug changeset rebuild; git diff --check.
